case_title: SEAN PATRICK FAUGHN VS. CHARLES PANKOW BUILDERS, LTD ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAR-11-2020 CONTINUED TO APR-22-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

Notice Of Defendant Charles Pankow Builders, Ltds Petition To Arbitrate And Request For Stay
Off Calendar Mar-05-2020 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
William Bogdan, Esq. of HINSHAW, T:310.899.2070, for defendant/ moving party;
Terry M. Finck, Esq. of DE LA PENA & HOLIDAY LLP, T:415.268.8000, for plaintiff/ opposing party.

RULING: The matter was argued. After arguments, the Court adopted its tentative ruling on DEFENDANT CHARLES PANKOW BUILDERS, LTD's Petition To Arbitrate And Request For Stay, as follows:

Defendant Pankow Builders, Ltd.'s motion to compel arbitration is denied in its entirety.

[See word minutes for the Court's full ruling.]

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com
